query: 可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊

Keep the recent raw turns because the latest request depends on the prior implementation/validation discussion and reframes the acceptance criterion: visible per-turn context size in the plugin/UI. Pin t2 as a durable priority rule: this problem blocks other work until solved.
